description: Style Note Designed for those who never compromise on comfort and style, this sandal from ganuchi is a great buy. Slip into it and pair it with jeans and casual T-shirts for unparalleled cool. Product Details Round toed black sandals with velcro closure and a strap around the ankle with a velcro closure Leather upper, open at the toe with cut outs in the midfoot region on the sides and stitched detail Soft footbed and padded inner Upper stitched to the outsole TPU outsole with deep grooves Material and Care Leather Wipe surface with a dry, clean cloth to remove dust and dirt Use a branded leather conditioner to maintain the shine
